name: Baked Flounder with Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fish in a baking dish or pan.
2. Prepare the sauce by browning the garlic and onions in melted butter.
3. When browned, add parsley, wine, and lemon juice. Blend until smooth.
4. Pour the sauce over the fish; sprinkle with salt, pepper, and flour.
5. Bake covered for 10 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
6. Uncover and baste the fish with melted butter and dry white wine.
7. Continue baking uncovered for an additional 10 minutes or until cooked to taste.
8. This recipe is also suitable for Flounder, mackerel, weakfish, grouper, snapper, bass, etc.
9. Suggestions: Vary the ingredients of the sauce with other recipes.
